text:
Senior Software Engineer — Acme Corp (San Francisco, CA, hybrid, 3 days/week in office)

Acme is hiring a Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform team. You'll own services used by every product team in the company. Compensation: $180,000–$220,000 base plus equity.

Requirements: 5+ years of backend experience, strong Python, production Kubernetes, AWS. Nice to have: Terraform, Postgres.

Junior Data Analyst at BrightStats

We're a remote-first company and this role is fully remote (US timezones). Great fit for recent graduates or early-career analysts.

Salary: $55k–$70k. You'll pull data, build dashboards, and help PMs answer product questions. We'll teach you the rest — no prior industry experience required. Must know: SQL, Excel, Tableau.

Frontend Developer — LondonTech Ltd.

Location: London, UK. This role is on-site at our Shoreditch office.

Salary: £65,000 – £85,000 per annum. 3+ years building production React apps. Required: React, TypeScript, CSS. Familiarity with Next.js a plus.

Machine Learning Engineer

DeepRoot AI — New York, NY (in-office). Flat comp: $160,000.

Work on our core recommendation model. Required skills: PyTorch, Python, distributed training. We care about impact, not years of experience.

Staff Backend Engineer, Payments

Stripe — Remote (US). $250,000 – $320,000 USD base + equity.

You'll lead large cross-team projects in our Payments org. 10+ years of backend experience required. Strong Go. Deep distributed systems background (consensus, replication, idempotency). Experience mentoring senior engineers.

Associate Product Manager

AxisCo — Berlin, Germany. On-site role, occasional WFH.

€60,000 – €75,000 per year. 1–3 years in a product or adjacent role. We'll train you on the rest. You should be comfortable writing SQL, running A/B tests, and working in Agile sprints.

DevOps Engineer — CloudNine

Austin, TX (on-site). Competitive salary; specific range disclosed later in the process.

You'll own our deployment pipeline end to end. Must have: 4+ years of DevOps experience, Terraform, AWS, Linux. Bonus: ArgoCD, Datadog.

Head of Data — Clearwater Finance

New York, NY. Hybrid, 2 days in the Midtown office. $220k–$260k USD base plus bonus.

10+ years in data, including at least 3 years managing a team of 5+. Strong Python and SQL. You'll own data strategy for our trading desks.

Software Engineering Intern (Summer)

UniGate — Toronto, ON, Canada. In-person internship at our Toronto office.

Compensation: CAD $25–$35 per hour depending on program year. Open to undergraduates in any year — no prior industry experience required. You'll pair with senior engineers on real features. Familiarity with Java and Git expected.

Solutions Architect — Zenith Systems

100% remote, open to candidates anywhere in the world. USD $140,000 – $180,000.

7+ years of cloud architecture experience. Required: AWS, Azure, Python. You'll design reference architectures and work directly with enterprise customers.

QA Engineer II — BetaQuest

Manchester, UK (in-office). £40,000 – £55,000.

2–4 years in software QA. Required: Selenium, Python, Cypress. You'll own the regression suite for our flagship SaaS product.

Site Reliability Engineer — GlobalBank

Singapore office (on-site). Salary is not disclosed in the posting; discussed during the interview.

5+ years of SRE or production engineering experience. Must know: Kubernetes, Prometheus, Go. You'll be on the primary on-call rotation for the retail banking platform.

iOS Mobile Developer — PixelFrame

Los Angeles, CA. In-office, 5 days/week. $130,000 – $160,000 USD.

3+ years of iOS development. Required: Swift, SwiftUI, iOS SDK. Your code will ship to 40M+ users.

Principal Security Engineer — FortressSec

Remote (US and Canada only). Total comp range: $240,000 – $290,000 USD base.

12+ years in application or infrastructure security. Required: offensive security background, strong Python. You'll lead our red-team program.

Data Engineer — LeafIO

Boston, MA. Hybrid: 3 days per week at our Seaport office. $110k – $140k.

3+ years building production data pipelines. Required: Spark, Airflow, SQL. Bonus: dbt.

Tech Lead, Backend — Alpine Labs

Paris, France. On-site role. €90,000 – €120,000.

7+ years of backend experience, including 2+ leading a team. Required: Python, Django, Postgres. You'll own the roadmap for the core platform team.

Customer Success Engineer — SaaSTools

Dublin, Ireland. In-office.

€55,000 – €70,000 EUR. 2+ years in a technical customer-facing role. Required: SQL, Zendesk. Bonus: basic Python scripting.

GPU Performance Engineer — NeuroNet

Seattle, WA. On-site. $170,000 – $210,000 USD.

4+ years optimizing GPU workloads. Required: CUDA, C++, Python. You'll own the GPU performance roadmap across our training and inference teams, set kernel-level standards other engineers build against, and mentor juniors on profiling methodology.

Full-Stack Developer (contract)

FreelanceHub — fully remote, work from anywhere. Hourly rate negotiable based on experience; no annual figure published.

We need someone who can ship end-to-end features. Required: JavaScript, Node.js, React.

Associate Software Engineer — TradeWell

Chicago, IL. In-office. $90,000 – $110,000 USD.

1–2 years of professional engineering experience. Required: Python, Pandas, SQL. You'll build analytics tools used by our commodity trading desk.

Senior iOS Engineer — FlashApp

San Francisco, CA. Hybrid role, 2 days/week in our SoMa office. $150,000 – $180,000 USD base.

3+ years of iOS development. Must know: Swift, Combine, CoreData. You'll own the checkout flow used by 10M+ monthly users.

Data Scientist — AlphaQuant

Sydney, Australia. On-site role at our CBD office. AUD $120,000 – $150,000 per year.

3+ years in quantitative research. Required: Python, scikit-learn, SQL. Nice to have: Rust, Julia.

FX Platform Engineer — MeridianMarkets

Hong Kong (in-office, 5 days/week). $170,000 – $210,000 USD total comp.

6+ years in trading infrastructure. Must know: Java, kdb+, Python. You'll work directly with the FX desk on low-latency pricing systems.

ML Infrastructure Engineer — Synapse

Remote, anywhere in the world. Flat comp: $175,000 plus equity.

You'll own our training orchestration layer end-to-end. 5+ years running production ML systems. Required: Python, Kubernetes, Ray.

Product Designer — MapleTech

Fully remote within Canada. CAD 95,000 – 125,000.

4+ years designing SaaS products. Required: Figma, user research. Bonus: motion design, design systems ownership.

Principal Product Manager — ChimeWorks

New York, NY. Hybrid, 3 days/week in our Flatiron office. $210,000 – $260,000 USD base plus bonus.

8+ years of product leadership. Required: SQL, Jira. Familiarity with Python a plus.

QA Automation Contractor — TestCrafted

Amsterdam, Netherlands. On-site required. Billable at €55/hour, expected 40 hours/week for a 6-month engagement.

3+ years automating CI test pipelines. Required: Selenium, Java. You'll own the regression suite for our flagship product.

Backend Engineer — HarborPay

Boston, MA. Hybrid: 2 days/week at our Seaport office. $130,000 – $170,000 USD.

5 to 8 years of backend experience required. Must know: Go, PostgreSQL, Kafka. You'll own our settlement service.

Full-Stack Engineer — PeakStack

Remote (UK only). £75,000 – £95,000 per year.

4+ years building production web apps. Required: TypeScript, React, Node.js. You'll ship features across our public API and customer dashboard.

Data Analyst — Quartile

Chicago, IL. In-office, 5 days/week. $65,000 – $80,000 USD.

Open to new graduates — 0–1 years of industry experience. Required: SQL, Excel, Python. You'll support the operations team with ad-hoc analysis.
